pi_items.metadata_value: Update papers from Report type to Conference Paper type and add proceedings titles
pi_items.verified_value: Setup script downgrades papers from journalArticle (22) to Report (27) and removes venue fields; task requires upgrading to Conference Paper (10) and adding proceedings titles
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh analysis showing papers initially seeded as journalArticle type, then downgraded to Report; verifier.py expects itemTypeID=10 (Conference Paper)
Zotero standard schema per seed_library.py documentation and setup_task.sh comments

privileged_info_summary: The task updates three real academic papers in a Zotero library from Report type to Conference Paper type with correct proceedings information. The three papers are: (1) 'Attention is All you Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017) published in Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 30; (2) 'Deep Residual Learning for Image Recognition' (He et al., 2016) published in the IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition; and (3) 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow et al., 2014) published in Advances in Neural Information Processing Systems 27. The metadata claims about the venue titles are accurate. The seed library contains partial author lists (only 3-4 of the actual 8 authors per paper), but this is consistent across all data sources in the task environment.
